shared_facts: The Trump administration has announced new tariffs ranging from 10% to 12.5% targeting more than 80 countries.
The administration cited the failure of these countries to restrict imported goods made with forced labor as the reason for the levies under Section 301 of the Trade Act of 1974.
The new measures replace a 10% global duty that was scheduled to expire.
latest_clusters.synthesis: The Trump administration has introduced new tariffs of 10% to 12.5% on over 80 countries, citing the failure of these nations to restrict goods produced with forced labor as the justification under the Trade Act of 1974. The measures replace a previous 10% global duty that was set to expire. The policy has prompted criticism from Democratic lawmakers, some Republicans, and international trading partners.
latest_clusters.confidence: HIGH. All sources agree on the core quantitative details of the tariffs and the stated policy justification provided by the US government.

shared_facts: A youth-led protest movement known as the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) has emerged in India.
The movement was triggered by grievances regarding irregularities and leaks in major public examinations.
Protesters are demanding education reforms and the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan.
Activist Sonam Wangchuk conducted a 26-day hunger strike in support of the movement and subsequently ended it following negotiations.
latest_clusters.synthesis: The Cockroach Janta Party has organized large-scale youth protests in India to demand education reform and the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan following exam paper irregularities. Activist Sonam Wangchuk supported the movement through a 26-day hunger strike, which he concluded following negotiations with government officials. These demonstrations have faced police intervention and remain a significant source of student mobilization.
latest_clusters.confidence: HIGH. The primary events, including the movement's existence, its core grievances, and the conclusion of the hunger strike, are consistently reported across both sources.
